## Summary

- 

## Testing

- [ ] Unit/integration tests added/updated
- [ ] E2E tests added/updated (if user-facing flow changed)
- [ ] `npm run lint`
- [ ] `npm run typecheck`
- [ ] `npm run test`
- [ ] `npm run build`

## Accessibility

- [ ] Keyboard navigation verified
- [ ] Focus states visible
- [ ] Screen reader labels/semantics checked for changed UI

## Performance

- [ ] No unnecessary client components introduced
- [ ] Images use `next/image` with sizes
- [ ] No new render-blocking assets without justification

## Risk / Rollback

- Risk level: low / medium / high
- Rollback: revert PR
